section_miscategorizations.reason: Presence of a coronary stent is an existing condition/diagnosis rather than an observed exam or test result in this encounter; it fits better as part of the problem list/assessment.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports a history of inferior myocardial infarction.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is patient-reported past history, not an observed finding or test result; placing it in Objective could mislead a reader into thinking it is a documented, clinician-verified event from this encounter.

section_miscategorizations.text: He has a stent in place.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The stent is a concrete prior procedure/device status and is typically documented in the Objective/problem list portion of the chart rather than as part of the diagnostic impression itself.
